Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10863 0 0}Hey, sorry for dumping some real heavy stuff on you last time, but you think you could help me out again?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}I'm going to my sister's place today, and I wanna get something for my nephew...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}I'm pretty bad at picking out presents and stuff, so I figured I could ask you for a second opinion.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}What should I get a five-year-old kid who's injured his leg...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10827 0 0}Dude, I just told you... His leg is injured.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}Were you even listening to me? Man, did I go to the wrong guy for help?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Miyamoto seems disappointed by my answer.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10879 0 0}{f 5 13 8 30 105}That makes sense... That way, he won't be bored at home.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}But games can be pretty expensive— No! This is for my nephew! Anything for my nephew![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Miyamoto seems to be having a lot of fun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10887 0 0}{f 5 13 8 15 105}So we, two high school students, are gonna go shopping in the KIDS' section?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}Uh, wouldn't that look kinda weird? But I'm doing this for my nephew... Guess it's time to put all that mental training to the test![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Miyamoto seems to be taking this seriously.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10867 0 0}Alright, let's get going! I'm countin' on you, {f 4 1}![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 105 3 25 25}And, uh... if I don't have enough money... you mind spottin' me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After going shopping with Miyamoto,[n]I headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
